name: cc-config
description: cc-config — the front desk of the cc-* harness: install, configure, and maintain the harness itself. Commands only — config is always the human's to run; the model can't invoke any of it. /cc-init is the onboarding orchestrator — it explains the layers, installs missing dependencies and recommended tools, then runs three setup commands behind skip/stop gates: /rules-management (install the recommended + capture the project's own rules into .claude/rules/), /cheatsheet-management (build the reminder cheat-sheet a UserPromptSubmit hook re-surfaces every few prompts), /docs-management (find stale prose). Ships the recommended project rules and the cheat-sheet hook. Install this first; it bootstraps the rest. The primitives live in cc-tools; the product script in cc-pipeline; the worker in cc-worker; the chief in cc-chief.
